description: 9 features: 5 new ACD MCP tools, /dispatch skill, POST /api/dispatch, Launch Job drawer, PRD Library tab

features.name: acd_list_prds tool: list all .md files in harness/prompts/ with parsed frontmatter, return { slug, domain, priority, path }[]
acd_write_prd tool: write PRD string to harness/prompts/{slug}.md, return { path, slug, bytesWritten }
acd_generate_features tool: read PRD, call Claude haiku extraction prompt, write harness/features/{slug}.json, return { count, path, features[] }
acd_dispatch tool: end-to-end wrapper calling acd_write_prd + acd_generate_features + acd_start, return { slug, pid, logFile, featuresGenerated, prdPath, featureListPath }
acd_list_running tool: scan harness/pids/ for .pid files, check process liveness, return [{ slug, isRunning, passed, total, percentComplete, pid }]
/dispatch skill: SKILL.md at skills/dispatch/ with 6-step workflow: inventory check, PRD draft, feature extraction, model selection, dispatch, /acd-status companion
POST /api/dispatch route in backend: accepts { slug, prdPath, featureListPath, targetPath, model }, spawns harness, SSE-broadcasts new worker to connected clients
Launch Job drawer in dashboard UI: PRD file picker (from acd_list_prds), target repo dropdown (repos.json), model selector, Generate Features button, Launch button
PRD Library tab in dashboard: table of all harness/prompts/ with name, domain, last run date, pass rate, quick-launch button, domain filter
